articles.description: Iranian attacks on Qatar's Ras Laffan LNG hub have caused natural gas prices to surge, though Europe's impact is expected to be less severe due to reduced reliance on Qatari LNG. While wholesale prices have jumped, they remain significantly lower than during the Ukraine conflict, with storage levels below average for the upcoming winter.

articles.title: UNI office sealed in Delhi; staffers allege manhandling by the police
articles.description: An order issued by the Land and Development Office, pursuant to a court judgment, had asked the United News of India agency to vacate the premises

topStories.title: ‘Enemy defeated…’: Mojtaba Khamenei says Iran dealt enemies ‘dizzying blow’ as conflict with US, Israel drags on
topStories.description: Mojtaba Khamenei further claimed that Israel and the US had the ‘illusion’ that if Ali Khamenei and other military leaders were killed, they would create ‘fear and despair’ and ‘realise the dream of dominating Iran and then dividing it’

topStories.description: A six-time karate champion and action film star, Norris was hospitalised in Hawaii on Thursday for unknown causes.

topStories.description: British ministers met on Friday to discuss the Iran war and Iran's blocking of the Strait of Hormuz, according to a Downing Street statement.

dailyNews.title: U.S. accuses Iran’s government of operating hacktivist group that hacked Stryker
dailyNews.description: The U.S. Justice Department said an Iranian security ministry operates the fake activist persona known as Handala, which claimed responsibility for the destructive hack targeting medical tech giant Stryker.

dailyNews.title: Did Chuck Norris suffer heart attack? Fact check on theories swirling around martial arts master’s death
dailyNews.description: The Delta Force and Walker, Texas Ranger star was hospitalised in Hawaii after an unknown incident occurred on the island of Kauai.

dailyNews.title: Trump’s AI framework targets state laws, shifts child safety burden to parents
dailyNews.description: Trump’s AI framework pushes federal preemption of state laws, emphasizes innovation, and shifts responsibility for child safety toward parents while laying out lighter-touch rules for tech companies.

dailyNews.title: Trump administration sues Harvard over treatment of Jewish and Israeli students, seeks to recover billions in funds
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department's lawsuit against Harvard alleges the university is indifferent to antisemitism on campus. The suit aims to enforce compliance and recover taxpayer money, amidst ongoing scrutiny of university practices regarding Jewish and Israeli students.

dailyNews.description: Air raid sirens sounded across Kuwait City as Iran targeted US assets with missiles and drones.

dailyNews.description: Trump is calling for US allies to help guarantee shipping through the Strait of Hormuz as NATO relocates Iraq personnel.

dailyNews.description: The legislative blueprint of the National Policy Framework for AI for Congress is split into seven broad categories, ranging from online safety laws for children to the protection of free speech and the streamlining of AI infrastructure.

dailyNews.title: What US-Israeli targets reveal about Iran war goals three weeks in
dailyNews.description: From degradation of military to efforts to foment unrest, targets show array of objectives but no single endgame.

dailyNews.description: Move comes as Swiss government also closed its airspace to US military flights directly linked to the Iran war.

dailyNews.description: The Trump administration is suing Harvard, alleging it failed to protect Jewish students from antisemitism and seeking billions in taxpayer funds back.

dailyNews.title: Reporter's Notebook: GOP pushes election security bill despite slim odds, as Trump pressure looms
dailyNews.description: Senate Republicans debate the SAVE America Act despite lacking votes, as Trump threatens to withhold endorsements from GOP members who oppose the bill.

dailyNews.title: Iran conflict won’t trigger Biden-style refugee replay, expert predicts
dailyNews.description: An immigration expert says Iran's instability is unlikely to trigger a Syrian- or Afghan-style refugee surge, as the Trump admin signals no intake plan.

dailyNews.title: Administration Bypasses Congress to Sell Weapons to U.A.E., Kuwait and Jordan
dailyNews.description: Some of the proposed sales, valued at more than $23 billion, were under review, while others were never sent to Congress. The Trump administration is pushing them through without congressional approval.

dailyNews.title: Deferring to Trump, G.O.P. Lawmakers Resist a Public Accounting on Iran
dailyNews.description: Nearly three weeks into a war that polls show is unpopular, top Republicans have yet to call administration officials to testify about it, arguing that hearings would put divisions on display.

dailyNews.title: U.S. Prosecutors Are Investigating Colombia President Gustavo Petro
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department is examining whether President Gustavo Petro of Colombia has ties to drug traffickers.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Sues Harvard Over Accusations of Antisemitism
dailyNews.description: The administration had spent months investigating the Ivy League school. The two sides had been in talks to negotiate a settlement.

dailyNews.title: Trump Friend Asked ICE to Detain the Mother of His Child
dailyNews.description: Paolo Zampolli, a former modeling agent and a longtime Trump ally, was in a custody battle over his son. An ICE official agreed to help.

dailyNews.title: A Meatpacking Strike in Colorado Is Another Stress to Trump’s Economy
dailyNews.description: The walkout at the JBS plant in Greeley, Colo., comes as beef prices have soared, cattle supplies have plunged and immigration sweeps have stressed the labor supply.

dailyNews.title: Alexander Brothers Are Said to Seek Trump Pardons for Sex Trafficking
dailyNews.description: People representing the three brothers have reached out to a lobbyist and an influential Jewish group that have supported clemency for others. There are no signs the White House is considering a pardon.

dailyNews.title: Are the Trump administration's efforts to lower oil and gas prices working?
dailyNews.description: With gas closing in on $4 a gallon, the Trump administration is pulling multiple levers to tame energy prices. The results have been mixed.

dailyNews.title: Trump calls NATO allies "cowards" as more Marines head toward Middle East
dailyNews.description: The Iran war is nearing the three-week mark as about 2,200 more U.S. Marines and three more warships are headed toward the region, two U.S. officials say.

dailyNews.title: Former Iran detainees urge Trump to help Americans held as "political pawns" in Iranian prisons
dailyNews.description: Former Iran detainees Siamak Namazi and Emad Shargi, who were among five U.S. citizens freed in a 2023 high-stakes diplomatic deal, tell "Face the Nation" moderator Margaret Brennan that they're worried about Americans held in Iranian prisons as the U.S. war there continues. Watch their full panel discussion.
